evidence: Skill provider promised a 200-word summary within 60 seconds for 0.05 USDC equivalent. Caller paid, request was accepted (HTTP 200) but the response stream timed out at 18 seconds with only 47 words returned. Provider claims 'partial delivery is non-refundable per service agreement clause 4.2'. Caller demands full refund + 0.5x penalty per the SLA template.

claims.plaintiff: Full refund + SLA penalty for non-delivery.
claims.defendant: Partial output delivered in good faith; clause 4.2 of provider TOS waives refunds on partial completion.

_note: callId is what the court will fileDispute() against on-chain. The caller does NOT need an EVM wallet — gas is paid by the court operator's finalizer wallet. If the court has no on-chain config, the verdict is still returned over anet (advisory mode).
